Gov.NIFC.Wildfires.WildfireIncident.name: WildfireIncident
Gov.NIFC.Wildfires.WildfireIncident.description: Active wildfire incident data from the National Interagency Fire Center (NIFC) IRWIN system, published via ArcGIS Feature Service.

WildfireIncident.name: WildfireIncident
WildfireIncident.description: Active wildfire incident data from the National Interagency Fire Center (NIFC) IRWIN system, published via ArcGIS Feature Service.

irwin_id.description: IRWIN incident identifier, a globally unique GUID assigned by the Integrated Reporting of Wildland-Fire Information (IRWIN) system. Primary key for wildfire incidents.

incident_name.description: The name assigned to the wildfire incident (e.g. 'Pinnacle', 'Backbone').

unique_fire_identifier.description: Unique fire identifier string assigned by the dispatching agency (e.g. '2025-ORRSF-000389'). May be null for incidents not yet assigned.

incident_type_category.description: Category of the incident type: WF (Wildfire), RX (Prescribed Fire), or other NWCG-defined categories.

incident_type_kind.description: Kind of incident from NWCG classification (e.g. 'FI' for Fire).

fire_discovery_datetime.description: Date and time when the fire was first discovered, in ISO 8601 format. Converted from ArcGIS epoch milliseconds.

daily_acres.description: Most recently reported fire size in acres from the daily situation report.

calculated_acres.description: GIS-calculated fire area in acres, derived from perimeter mapping when available.

discovery_acres.description: Size of the fire in acres at the time of initial discovery.

percent_contained.description: Percentage of the fire perimeter that is contained (0-100). Null if not reported.

poo_state.description: US state or territory where the point of origin is located, as a two-letter code prefixed with 'US-' (e.g. 'US-OR', 'US-CA').

poo_county.description: County where the point of origin of the fire is located (e.g. 'Curry', 'Kings').

latitude.description: Latitude of the fire incident point of origin in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

longitude.description: Longitude of the fire incident point of origin in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

fire_cause_general.description: Specific fire cause category when known (e.g. 'Lightning', 'Arson', 'Equipment Use').

gacc.description: Geographic Area Coordination Center responsible for the incident (e.g. 'NWCC', 'OSCC', 'EACC'). GACCs coordinate wildfire management resources across regions.

total_incident_personnel.description: Total number of personnel assigned to the incident including all resources.

incident_management_organization.description: Name or type of the incident management organization or team managing the fire.

fire_mgmt_complexity.description: Complexity level of the fire management effort, typically a Type designation (e.g. 'Type 1' for the most complex).

residences_destroyed.description: Number of residential structures destroyed by the fire.

other_structures_destroyed.description: Number of non-residential structures (outbuildings, commercial, etc.) destroyed by the fire.

injuries.description: Number of injuries reported in connection with the incident.

fatalities.description: Number of fatalities reported in connection with the incident.

containment_datetime.description: Date and time the fire was fully contained, in ISO 8601 format. Null if not yet contained.

control_datetime.description: Date and time the fire was declared under control, in ISO 8601 format. Null if not yet controlled.

fire_out_datetime.description: Date and time the fire was declared out, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the fire is still active.

final_acres.description: Final fire size in acres after the fire is declared out.

modified_on_datetime.description: Date and time when the incident record was last modified in the IRWIN system, in ISO 8601 format.
